overview.description: The Sterling Capital National Municipal Bond ETF (SCNM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in US municipal bonds of various maturities exempt from regular federal income tax. SCNM was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Sterling Capital.
